creator: eric.douzet@laposte.net
text:
Hello,

After the update of 30 January, when I launch in Xorg-7.4 with "startx" in xterm, I have a message:

For xfe

product# Xlib: extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
product# Xlib: extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".

For firefox 2.0

product# Xlib: extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
product# Xlib: extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
product# Xlib: extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
product# Xlib: extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
product# Xlib: extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
product# Xlib: extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".

For emacs 22.3

product# Xlib: extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
product# Xlib: extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
product# Xlib: extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
product# Xlib: extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
product# Xlib: extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
product# Xlib: extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".

My list of installed packages:

http://www.c-extra.com/en/freebsd-web-server.html

Before this update, no message...

Best regards,

Eric
